detail.description:
Available exclusively for Crunchyroll Mega and Ultimate Fan Members.

Welcome to Coal Town, a lively and prosperous town that seems to have been frozen in time since the Showa era. In this town, there are energetic working-class people going about their day. After meeting a mysterious young girl, Shinnosuke becomes friends with these people.
And so begins Shinnosuke’s newest adventure…!

FEATURES
- Fish Akita’s diverse rivers to catch common and rare species to add to your nature book collection
